faqs.question: How quickly can you treat drain flies in my West Farms property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day drain fly treatment services throughout West Farms. Most treatments are completed within 1-2 hours, and you'll notice a significant reduction in drain fly activity within 24-48 hours as our bio-enzymatic treatments eliminate breeding sites in your drains.

faqs.question: What does the $350-$550 drain fly treatment include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive drain fly treatment includes a thorough inspection of all drains and moisture areas, professional-grade bio-enzymatic drain cleaning to eliminate organic buildup, treatment of breeding sites, application of targeted residual products, and a follow-up visit if needed. Price varies based on property size and infestation severity.

faqs.question: Why do drain flies keep coming back in West Farms buildings?
faqs.answer: Drain flies thrive in the organic matter that accumulates in drains, particularly in older West Farms buildings with aging plumbing systems. Without proper treatment of the biofilm layer where they breed, drain flies will continue to reproduce. Our treatments eliminate these breeding sources and include preventative recommendations to keep them from returning.

faqs.question: Are your drain fly treatments safe for West Farms apartments and families?
faqs.answer: Yes, our drain fly treatments use eco-friendly, low-toxicity products that are safe for residential use around children and pets. We primarily use bio-enzymatic cleaners that naturally break down organic matter in drains without harsh chemicals, making them ideal for West Farms apartment buildings and multi-family homes.
